programme.title: Barely Lethal
programme.desc: Megan Walsh, a special agent, is curious about teenage life experiences so she fakes her own death and enrols in high school. Soon, she realises the troubles of high school life.

programme.title: The Giver
programme.desc: Jonas, a young man, trains under an elder in order to become the keeper of his community's memories. However, things get complicated once he discovers the sinister side of his city.

programme.title: No Escape
programme.desc: Jack Dwyer and his family move to a country in Southeast Asia. However, a sudden and violent uprising forces them to flee or risk being executed.

programme.title: Lady Bloodfight
programme.desc: Jane, an American girl travelling in Hong Kong, gets into a physical altercation with three robbers where she defends herself. A martial artist, who observes the event, trains her for a competition.

programme.title: Snowpiercer
programme.desc: New power dynamics emerge amongst the survivors of the second ice age when they board a train travelling across the globe.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Part 1
programme.desc: After putting an end to the dystopian Hunger Games, Katniss Everdeen and her friends attempt to rescue a brainwashed companion and free their nation from the control of President Coriolanus Snow.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man
programme.desc: After a genetically altered spider bites him, Peter Parker develops superhuman abilities and confronts a humanoid reptilian creature.

programme.title: Ghost Rider: Spirit of Vengeance
programme.desc: A French monk seeks out the Ghost Rider, a superpowered antihero, for help in protecting a young boy who is being pursued by the Devil and his minions.

programme.title: Stuart Little
programme.desc: Upon getting adopted by the Littles, Stuart, a mouse, is unwelcomed by his new brother George. So, when Stuart begins to feel low the family helps him find his real parents.

programme.title: Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: After losing his job, lover and his powers, Peter Parker feels dissatisfied with his life. Soon, amidst all this chaos, he also has to fight Doctor Octavius who poses a threat to the New York.

Upon her return to shore, Athena's son finds himself in trouble with the law; Buck grows envious as Eddie forms a close bond with someone else; the team rescues a woman who's stuck on receiving a rose at an iconic mansion.

Hen and Karen welcome a new addition to their family; a call unfolds involving a person's limb that's taken on a mind of its own; Eddie and Marisol take a closer look at their relationship; Buck navigates his new feelings.

After years of anticipation, Maddie and Chimney's long-awaited wedding day arrives; when the groom mysteriously vanishes, the 118 races against time to ensure he doesn't miss the most crucial day of his life.
Maddie and Athena investigate a case surrounding an abducted mother and child; Hen and Karen learn more about Mara's family history; Eddie grapples with unresolved feelings for someone from his past.

A fire breaks out in an accountant's office and a car crashes into a "living funeral"; Athena is shocked when a suspect dies in her custody minutes after she arrests him; Buck is attracted to a death doula; Maddie and Chimney are audited by the IRS.

programme.title: CINTA TANPA KARENA EPS 403-404

programme.title: KESETIAAN JANJI CINTA EPS 12
programme.desc: Meira no longer feels happy in her marriage. Lately, Arya, her husband, constantly looks for faults in her. As a result, Meira and Arya often get into arguments. The situation reaches its peak when Arya refuses to provide for Meira anymore. He even refuses to help cover the medical expenses of Meira's mother, Siti. Arya also stops paying for Lani's college tuition, Meira's younger sister. Even tho

programme.title: SEINDAH CINTA MUTIARA 37
programme.desc: It tells the story of Mutiara, who must struggle hard in order to live a decent life. However, problems keep coming one after another, forcing Mutiara to become even stronger to survive them. There are even people around her who are always cruel and hateful toward her. Fortunately, there is Diandra, a friend who never stops supporting Mutiara and encouraging her to keep going.

programme.title: RAHASIA DAN CINTA 16
programme.desc: Dwita, the daughter of a prominent business tycoon, is arranged to marry Greg. The two are brought together because their fathers want to merge their companies. Dwita's father knows that she will most likely reject this plan. Therefore, he provides her with a new facility—a bodyguard named Debu. Thus begins the journey of Dwita, Greg, and Debu, as various problems start to arise in Dwita's life.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons
